title: PvP Ready
description: Welcome to PvP Ready  Pack. this pvp pack Is an Optimized Version Of Minecraft, It is Optimized for Fps,Pvp
body:
Sure! Here's the updated disclaimer added in:

pvp ready — Performance & PvP Optimization

pvp ready is a lightweight Minecraft optimization modpack built to maximize FPS, reduce lag, and sharpen your PvP experience. Designed for competitive play, it keeps the vanilla feel while delivering a faster, more responsive game.

Instead of adding unnecessary content, pvp ready focuses on performance improvements, smart configurations, and carefully selected mods to make Minecraft run as smoothly as possible — so you can focus on winning fights, not fixing lag.

Performance





Significant FPS improvements via Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore & more



Reduced stuttering and lag spikes



Optimized settings for smoother gameplay



Full-bright enabled out of the box for maximum visibility

PvP Features





Improved hit registration with BetterHitreg



Shield status indicators (green = ready, red = cooldown)



Combat hitbox visualization



Totem pop counter



Armor durability HUD



Crystal PvP tier display

Quality of Life





Zoomify zoom keybind (hold to zoom)



AppleSkin saturation & hunger overlays



No death animation



Bare Bones texture pack included for clean, readable visuals



FOV set to 95 out of the box

Details





Minecraft 1.21.11 (Fabric)



Client-side only — works on most servers



Minimal setup, no content mods

⚠️ Keep in Mind

Some mods included in this pack may be considered unfair advantages on certain servers and could result in a ban. Always check the rules of the server you're playing on before using this pack. Use at your own risk.
